results.question: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
results.sql: SELECT Fiscal_Year, SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity) AS total_revenue, SUM(Total Product Cost * Order Quantity) AS total_cost, SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity - Total Product Cost * Order Quantity) AS gross_profit, ROUND(SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity - Total Product Cost * Order Quantity) / SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity) * 100, 2) AS gross_margin_pct, COUNT(SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_order_lines FROM Sales GROUP BY Fiscal_Year ORDER BY Fiscal_Year ASC

results.question: Compare the Reseller and Internet sales channels showing total revenue, revenue share percentage, number of distinct sales orders, order lines, average line amount, and gross margin percentage. Return columns: Channel, total_revenue, revenue_share_pct, total_orders, order_lines, avg_line_amount, gross_margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT Channel, SUM(SalesAmount) AS total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(SalesAmount) / SUM(SalesAmount) OVER (PARTITION BY Channel), 2) * 100 AS revenue_share_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT Sales.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_orders, COUNT(Sales.SalesOrderLineKey) AS order_lines, ROUND(SUM(UnitPrice) / COUNT(Sales.SalesOrderLineKey), 2) AS avg_line_amount, ROUND(100 - (SUM(UnitPrice) / SUM(SalesAmount)) * 100, 2) AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales.SalesOrderLineKey = Sales_Order.SalesOrderLineKey GROUP BY Channel ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

results.question: Show revenue, revenue share percentage, units sold, gross profit, and gross margin percentage by product category. Return columns: Category, revenue, revenue_share_pct, units_sold, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT p.Category, SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS revenue, ROUND(SUM(s.Extended Amount) * 100.0 / SUM(s.Total Product Cost), 2) AS revenue_share_pct, SUM(s.Order Quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(s.Extended Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit, ROUND((SUM(s.Extended Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost)) * 100.0 / SUM(s.Extended Amount), 2) AS gross_margin_pct FROM Sales s JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey GROUP BY p.Category ORDER BY SUM(s.Extended Amount) DESC

results.question: List the top 15 direct customers (excluding CustomerKey -1) by lifetime revenue, showing customer name, city, state/province, country/region, total orders, total line items, total units, lifetime revenue, and lifetime profit. Return columns: Customer, City, State-Province, Country-Region, total_orders, total_line_items, total_units, lifetime_revenue, lifetime_profit. Sort by lifetime_revenue descending, limit to 15 rows.
results.sql: SELECT c.Customer, c.City, c."State-Province", c."Country-Region", SUM(s.OrderQuantity) AS total_orders, SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS total_line_items, SUM(s.OrderQuantity) * SUM(s.UnitPrice) AS total_units, SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS lifetime_revenue, SUM(s.SalesAmount) - SUM(s.ProductStandardCost * s.OrderQuantity) AS lifetime_profit FROM Sales s JOIN Customer c ON s.CustomerKey = c.CustomerKey WHERE s.CustomerKey != -1 GROUP BY c.Customer, c.City, c."State-Province", c."Country-Region" ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC LIMIT 15

results.question: For the Reseller channel only, show reseller count, total revenue, revenue per reseller, gross profit, and margin percentage by business type. Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.
results.sql: SELECT r."Business Type", COUNT(DISTINCT s."ResellerKey"), SUM(s."Sales Amount"), SUM(s."Sales Amount") / COUNT(DISTINCT s."ResellerKey"), SUM(s."Total Product Cost"), (SUM(s."Sales Amount") - SUM(s."Total Product Cost")) / SUM(s."Sales Amount") * 100 FROM "Sales" s JOIN "Reseller" r ON s."ResellerKey" = r."ResellerKey" JOIN "Sales_Order" so ON s."SalesOrderLineKey" = so."SalesOrderLineKey" WHERE so."Channel" = 'Reseller' GROUP BY r."Business Type" ORDER BY SUM(s."Sales Amount") DESC

columns: (((sum(s."Sales Amount") - sum(s."Total Product Cost")) / sum(s."Sales Amount")) * 100)

extraColumns: (((sum(s."Sales Amount") - sum(s."Total Product Cost")) / sum(s."Sales Amount")) * 100)
